{{CharInfobox |Box title = Edison |image = File:Edison.png |gender = Male |age = Old |hair colour = Bald |hometown = [[Torenia City]] |leader of = [[Torenia Gym]] |badge = [[File:Midnight Badge.png]]Midnight Badge |speciality = Electric-types (2010)
Dark-types (2016) |imagewidth = 80 |game = [[Pokémon Prism]]}} '''{{PAGENAME}}''' is the Leader of [[Torenia Gym]] in the [[Naljo]] region. He specializes in '''Dark''' Type Pokémon, and will confer the '''Midnight Badge''' and [[TMs (Prism)|TM51]] (Dark Pulse) upon defeat. The first time the player visits [[Torenia City]], Edison will not battle them. Only once they have cleared the [[Haunted Mansion]] will he agree to a battle.
